## Summary

Describe the change and the implementation phase it belongs to.

## Checklist

- [ ] Architecture boundaries preserved (validation only — no training, datasets, registry, agents)
- [ ] Aligns with frozen TDD and Implementation Plan
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated where required
- [ ] Ruff and mypy pass locally
- [ ] No speculative profiles beyond current phase scope

## Testing

Describe how the change was verified.

## Deferred work

List anything intentionally left for a later phase.
